The '''Blade of Nyenthi'Oris''', meaning '''Blade of the Great Tree''', was a one-handed [[Sword/Legends|sword]] created by the members of the [[Kerritamba Village]] in the [[Kkowir Forest/Legends|Kkowir Forest]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. It was said to "glitter" with the pride of the Kerritamba people and was only given to the most honorable of citizens. Sometime after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], one of these swords was awarded to a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] who had been of immense help to the village and its citizens. The sword was given to the spacer by [[Chief/Legends|Chief]] [[Kerritamba]] after the sentient had cured the village's [[Great Tree (Kashyyyk)|Great Tree]] of an unknown illness.<ref name="SWGROTW" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Blade of Nyenthi'Oris appeared in ''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]'', a [[2005]] expansion pack for the [[Star Wars video games|MMORPG]] [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']] prior to the games closure on [[December 15]], 2011. developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment. It was a reward for the player after they assisted the Kerritamba villages in healing their Great Tree of an unknown sickness. It is listed in the ''[[Star Wars Galaxies: The Total Experience: Prima Official Game Guide]]'' and the ''[[Star Wars Galaxies: The Complete Guide: Prima Official Game Guide]]'' in a list of weapons and their general statistics. With the release of ''Game Update 5'' on [[June 28]], [[2008]], players were able to deconstruct this and many other unique weapons into a schematic, which they could then bring to a Munitions Trader and have the weapon recreated by the Trader, vastly improving its combat effectiveness.
